plan_adherence_notes: All 11 plan steps were completed. The 7 existing tests were refactored from client-level to hook-level mocking (steps 1-2), and 8 new tests were added (steps 3-10): loading state, error state, Volume/Liquidity/Expires display, PositionCard visible, PositionCard hidden, EventRow rendering, EventRow expand/collapse, and ResolveMarketPanel integration. Step 11 (run tests) confirmed all 15 tests pass. Minor deviation: step 9 used fireEvent.click instead of userEvent.click (plan noted fireEvent as acceptable fallback). Step 3 has a redundant mockReturnValue call (line 274-276 is immediately overridden on 278-281) but this is cosmetic. All plan decisions (d1-d7) were followed: hook-level mocking with importActual for SessionProvider, fake timers, integration-style testing of private components, and correct 'resolvable' definition.
missed_questions: Should tests verify route params edge cases (e.g., missing marketId)?
Should tests cover the DiscussionThread or TradingPanel sections as rendered within MarketDetail?
Should the existing future-dated expires_at (2026-12-31) in mock data be updated to be relative to the fake timer date for consistency?
reason: All 15 tests pass (7 refactored + 8 new). Full suite of 386 tests across 32 files passes with no regressions. The mocking refactor from client-level to hook-level was well-researched (vi.mock hoisting constraint) and cleanly executed. Research identified the correct 'resolvable market' definition by reading ResolveMarketPanel source. Fake timers were adopted per the DiscussionThread pattern. The test coverage now includes loading/error branches, Volume/Liquidity/Expires display, PositionCard conditional rendering, EventRow table rendering and expand/collapse interaction, and ResolveMarketPanel integration — all areas that were previously untested.
